findings.title: Missing HTTP Header: X-Frame-Options
findings.recommendation: Configure the server to send the X-Frame-Options header.

findings.title: Missing HTTP Header: Content-Security-Policy
findings.recommendation: Configure the server to send the Content-Security-Policy header.

findings.title: Missing HTTP Header: X-Content-Type-Options
findings.recommendation: Configure the server to send the X-Content-Type-Options header.

findings.title: Missing HTTP Header: Strict-Transport-Security
findings.recommendation: Configure the server to send the Strict-Transport-Security header.
